title: Seshat BI Knowledge Contract (per flow stage)
description: One stage entry in contracts/knowledge/database-to-pbip-flow.yaml (and the interview/report contract files). Contracts reference existing knowledge-map routes; they never duplicate knowledge-base content.

allowed_routes.description: Existing knowledge-map routes only. Invariants enforced across entries: KPI-meaning questions route to retail_kpi from ANY stage; bigdata requires recorded scale evidence (else python); execution adapters appear in NO stage's routes for meaning/mapping/metric/semantic/approval work.

required_inputs.description: Artifacts and decision categories that must exist before entry; critical categories must be approved, not merely proposed.

stop_rules.description: Each stop rule names the halting condition AND what concretely unblocks it (FR-030).

blocking_decision_categories.description: decision_type values that, while unresolved in scope, make this stage's verdict blocked.
